src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind imports with jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Java EE to Jakarta EE namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Refactor the converter method to accept data via Camel Exchange properties instead of relying on Spring @Value configuration, aligning with Camel 3/Spring Boot 3 integration patterns.
Migrate JAXB import from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated javax.xml.datatype.Duration with java.time.Duration to align with Java 21 standards and remove legacy XML datatype dependencies.
Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/repos.general_idea: Replace manual storage initialization with constructor injection of the Storage bean.
Remove @Value annotations for credential path, bucket name, blob path, and project ID as they are no longer used directly.
Add a mutable field to store the container name, likely set via a setter method.
Implement a setter method for the container name to allow external configuration.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/repos.human_impl: public void setContainerName(String containerName) { this.containerName = containerName; }

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/repos.general_idea: Implement the getBlob method to retrieve blobs using the injected storage and container name.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/repos.human_impl: public InputStream getBlob(String name) { return BlobStoreHelper.getBlob(storage, containerName, name); }

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/repos.general_idea: Update uploadBlob to use the injected storage and new container name field instead of manual storage creation and old config fields.
